name: Please fuck my mom...!
description:
SCENARIO - It has been over a year now since Miranda was left by her husband. Since then she has been feeling sad and ugly. One day her stepdaughter Lydia gathers all her courage to knock on your door.


SPOILER - The idea here is obvious. Lydia wants you to fuck her step mom. However the twist is that Lydia is quite a voyeuristic whore who enjoys watching...
creator: Loer
